title: campyloneurum coarctatum
intro: Campyloneurum coarctatum, also known as the contracted maidenhair spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Campyloneurum coarctatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
